name: Jotty
description: A simple app, for your checklists and notes
compose:
name: slashnode-jotty
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/fccview/jotty:1.25.1
    container_name: jotty
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
    volumes:
      - web_data-app:/app/data
      - web_data-config:/app/config
      - web_data-cache:/app/.next/cache
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8345:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-app:
    name: slashnode-jotty_web_data-app
  web_data-config:
    name: slashnode-jotty_web_data-config
  web_data-cache:
    name: slashnode-jotty_web_data-cache
